subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto my Beloved, Who hath, through His divine power, rent asunder the thick veils of contingent being and revealed the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی راست که حجبات غلیظه امکانیه را بقدره الهیه خرق فرمود و جمال قدم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @call to action, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power of the Manifestation of God
